## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs/chore

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] Manual smoke test completed in local dev
- [ ] Preview deployment verified (for UI/gameplay changes)

## Deployment Impact

- [ ] No deploy impact
- [ ] Requires env var changes
- [ ] Requires staging verification before production

## Checklist

- [ ] Linked issue/task (or explained why none)
- [ ] Kept scope focused and backward compatible
- [ ] Updated docs if behavior/config changed

## Notes for Reviewer

Call out specific files, risks, or areas that need focused review.
